competitors.name: Product Hunt AI 新品雷达
competitors.raw_snapshot: Product Hunt AI 类目新品雷达（WebSearch 结果，非官方原文）：本轮 Top 条目集中在 'AI 自动员工/执行助理' 范式 —— Polsia(『AI that runs your company while you sleep』，管理 400+ 公司、自动回复投资人), Yansu(『AI that learns how you work and turns it into software』), Mode AI(『AI Assistant in your pocket』，连接 Gmail/Docs/Outlook/Teams), Espa(AI executive assistant), Coworker AI(context-aware model routing)。未见到与 meee2 'session 同构 / live link / descriptive canvas' 直接重叠的新进入者。
competitors.content_hash: Product Hunt AI 类目新品雷达（WebSearch 结果，非官方原文）：本轮 Top 条目集中在 'AI 自动员工/执行助理' 范式 —— Polsia(『AI that runs your company while you sleep』，管理 400+ 公司、自动回复投资人), Yansu(『AI that learns how you work and turns it int
key_findings: 本轮新品雷达扫描（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文）未发现与 meee2 核心抽象（session 同构 / live link / descriptive canvas）结构性重叠的新进入者
新品集中在『AI 自动员工』范式（Polsia / Yansu / Mode AI / Espa），与 meee2『人=慢 session、AI=快 session，同协议协作』的路线分属不同范式
competitors.no_change_reason: 首次纳入追踪（来源为 WebSearch 兜底，非官方原文），扫描范围内未见到触及 meee2 差异化锚点的信号，按『无新动态』处理

competitors.name: Cursor
competitors.raw_snapshot:
Cursor 更新摘要（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，HN Algolia 与官方 changelog 均 403）：
Cursor 3.0（4月2日）：『The new Cursor interface allows you to run many agents in parallel across repos and environments: locally, in worktrees, in the cloud, and on remote SSH, and is centered around agents.』
Cursor 3.2（4月24日）：引入 /multitask，『lets Cursor's agent execution runtime spawn async subagents in parallel rather than serializing requests in a queue』，单个 agent session 可面向多文件夹可复用 workspace 做跨仓库变更。
Cursor 3.5（5月20日）：Cloud Agents——『agents that run in isolated cloud VMs with full terminal, browser, and desktop access, can work across multiple repos in parallel, and report results back to your IDE asynchronously』。
近期 canvas 改进：Debug with Agent 按钮、共享 canvas 全屏浏览器打开、『the ability for agents to embed buttons in canvases that will run a specific prompt when clicked』。
6月3日：企业可『manage multiple Cursor teams from one place, with different security, governance, budget, and feature controls for each』。
competitors.content_hash:
Cursor 更新摘要（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，HN Algolia 与官方 changelog 均 403）：
Cursor 3.0（4月2日）：『The new Cursor interface allows you to run many agents in parallel across repos and environments: locally, in workt

changes.description: Cursor 3.0 把 IDE 重新定位为『Agent Execution Runtime』，界面围绕多 agent 并行运行（本地 / worktree / 云端 / 远程 SSH）设计
changes.evidence: 「The new Cursor interface allows you to run many agents in parallel across repos and environments: locally, in worktrees, in the cloud, and on remote SSH, and is centered around agents.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：从『编辑器+AI』转向『围绕多 agent session 并行调度』的产品重心迁移，是向 meee2『人机同协议』方向延伸的明确信号（但当前仍是单人多 agent，未把人纳入同构 session）

changes.description: Cloud Agents 支持在隔离云 VM 中运行并异步把结果汇报回 IDE
changes.evidence: 「agents that run in isolated cloud VMs with full terminal, browser, and desktop access, can work across multiple repos in parallel, and report results back to your IDE asynchronously」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：『agent 异步运行 + 结果异步汇报回主界面』雏形，结构上接近『快 session 产出，慢 session 异步消费』的协议

changes.description: Canvas 新增 agent 可嵌入可点击交互按钮、共享 canvas 全屏浏览，强化跨场景画布协作
changes.evidence: 「the ability for agents to embed buttons in canvases that will run a specific prompt when clicked」「the ability to open shared canvases full-screen in the browser」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2 / #3：可交互、可共享的 canvas 正在向『活链接 + descriptive canvas』方向靠近，需持续观察其是否发展为跨工具活链接

key_findings: Cursor 在 2026 年内完成从『代码编辑器 + AI』到『Agent Execution Runtime』的产品重定位，3.0 / 3.2 / 3.5 三个大版本均围绕多 agent 并行调度展开
Cloud Agents 支持异步汇报结果到 IDE，且 canvas 支持 agent 嵌入可点击交互按钮 —— 与 meee2『人机同协议 + descriptive canvas』方向出现结构性靠拢信号

competitors.name: OpenAI / ChatGPT
competitors.raw_snapshot:
OpenAI / ChatGPT 更新摘要（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，openai.com RSS 与 help center 均 403）：
Workspace agents：『Workspace agents help teams get more done together across tools, can own entire workflows on their own, follow team processes, and be shared across teams so people can build once and use together.』免费试用期延长至 2026-07-06，之后转为按 credit 计费。
Canvas 收敛：『Canvas will no longer be available in GPT-5.5 Instant or GPT-5.5 Thinking, with writing and coding functionality now supported directly in chat responses through writing blocks and code blocks.』
新 design canvas：可将 AI 生成元素与人工调整混合后『feed the result directly to an agent that prepares it for social media, ads, or print』。
Projects：Team 用户上传文件上限从 20 提升到 40。
competitors.content_hash:
OpenAI / ChatGPT 更新摘要（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，openai.com RSS 与 help center 均 403）：
Workspace agents：『Workspace agents help teams get more done together across tools, can own entire workflows on their ow

changes.description: Workspace agents 即将（7月6日）从免费内测转入按 credit 计费阶段，并明确强调可跨团队共享、『build once use together』
changes.evidence: 「Workspace agents help teams get more done together across tools, can own entire workflows on their own, follow team processes, and be shared across teams so people can build once and use together.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：『跨团队共享、build once use together』与 meee2 的跨 session / 跨工具 / 跨 owner artifact pull 框架方向接近，是 OpenAI 向团队协作层延伸的明确信号

changes.description: 原生 Canvas 功能在新模型（GPT-5.5）中被并入对话主体（writing/code blocks），独立 canvas 范式趋于收敛
changes.evidence: 「Canvas will no longer be available in GPT-5.5 Instant or GPT-5.5 Thinking, with writing and coding functionality now supported directly in chat responses through writing blocks and code blocks.」

key_findings: OpenAI『workspace agents』即将从免费内测转入商业化（7月6日起按 credit 计费），并首次明确强调『可跨团队共享、build once use together』，正向跨工具/跨 owner 协作范式靠拢
原生 Canvas 在 GPT-5.5 中被并入对话主体，独立画布范式趋于收敛，与此同时设计场景新增『AI生成元素+人工调整』混合 canvas

competitors.name: Windsurf (Codeium)
competitors.raw_snapshot:
Windsurf (Codeium) 更新摘要（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，HN Algolia 与官方 changelog 均 403）：
重大信号——品牌重塑：『Devin Desktop is the new name for Windsurf. We're building on the IDE foundation of Windsurf to introduce the command center for managing all your agents in one place.』
Devin 集成：『Devin is now available for Terminal. All Windsurf users can use this new CLI agent with your existing subscription. Additionally, you can enable the new Devin Local agent in Windsurf. In testing, it's up to 30% more token-efficient than the existing Cascade agent.』
模型接入：支持 Gemini 3 Pro 预览版；可用 Anthropic 自带 API Key 在 Cascade 中使用 Claude 4 Sonnet/Opus 系列模型；GPT-5.1 优先处理通道（约 50 tokens/秒，2倍标准费率）。

Windsurf (Codeium) 更新摘要（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，HN Algolia 与官方 changelog 均 403）：

changes.description: Windsurf 品牌重塑为『Devin Desktop』，定位从 IDE 转向『统一管理你所有 agent 的指挥中心』
changes.evidence: 「Devin Desktop is the new name for Windsurf. We're building on the IDE foundation of Windsurf to introduce the command center for managing all your agents in one place.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1 / #5：『统一管理所有 agent session 的指挥中心』直接逼近 meee2 的核心定位方向（统一协议下管理人机协作 session），是本轮抓取中与 meee2 结构重叠度最高的单一信号

changes.description: Devin agent 已集成进 Windsurf 终端与本地环境，与原生 Cascade agent 并存

key_findings: 重大信号：Windsurf 正更名为『Devin Desktop』，并明确自我定位为『管理你所有 agent 的指挥中心』——这与 meee2 的核心定位（人=慢session/AI=快session，统一协议管理）高度重叠，是本轮抓取中威胁信号最强的发现
Devin agent 已集成进 Windsurf 终端与本地环境，与原生 Cascade agent 并存，预示多 agent 协同管理范式正在成型

competitors.name: Claude.ai / Anthropic
competitors.raw_snapshot:
Claude.ai / Anthropic 更新摘要（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，anthropic.com 全部 403）：
Claude Code：『In Claude Code, you can now assemble agent teams to work on tasks together.』并已引入 Routines。
Artifacts：『Artifacts now support MCP and persistent storage.』
Claude Design：『Claude Design builds a design system for your team by reading your codebase and design files, with every project after that using your colors, typography, and components automatically.』
模型：Claude Opus 4.6（百万 token 上下文 beta）、Claude Opus 4.7（较 4.6 提升 14%、tool error 降至三分之一）。
Agent 能力：新增 Tool Search Tool、Programmatic Tool Calling、Tool Use Examples。
competitors.content_hash:
Claude.ai / Anthropic 更新摘要（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，anthropic.com 全部 403）：
Claude Code：『In Claude Code, you can now assemble agent teams to work on tasks together.』并已引入 Routines。
Artifacts：『Artifacts now

changes.description: Claude Code 新增『组建 agent 团队协作完成任务』能力，并引入 Routines
changes.evidence: 「In Claude Code, you can now assemble agent teams to work on tasks together.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：Anthropic 自身正在 Claude Code 中构建『多 agent 团队协作』框架——是与 meee2『人机同协议、同图协作』定位最直接的同源技术栈信号，需高度关注其是否进一步把『人』纳入同一协作图

changes.description: Artifacts 新增 MCP 支持与持久化存储
changes.evidence: 「Artifacts now support MCP and persistent storage.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2：持久化 + MCP 连接是从『快照』走向『跨工具活链接』的前置条件，需持续观察其是否进一步发展为 live link

changes.description: Claude Design 通过读取代码库与设计文件自动构建团队设计系统
changes.evidence: 「Claude Design builds a design system for your team by reading your codebase and design files, with every project after that using your colors, typography, and components automatically.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #3：『从代码库与设计文件中读取真实样式自动构建系统』正是『descriptive-first，flow 从真实行为 emerge』的同构实践

key_findings: Anthropic 正在 Claude Code 中构建『agent 团队协作』能力（Routines + 多 agent 编队），这是与 meee2 核心抽象（人机同协议协作）同源技术栈下最直接的潜在信号
Artifacts 新增 MCP + 持久化存储支持，为『活链接而非快照』范式打基础
Claude Design『从真实代码/设计行为中 emerge 设计系统』的 descriptive-first 思路，与 meee2 锚点 #3 高度同构

competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
competitors.raw_snapshot:
# GitHub Copilot: Key Marketing & Feature Content

## Core Agent & Autonomous Capabilities

**Multi-Agent Support:**
"Use your agents, your way" - GitHub Copilot supports custom agents alongside third-party options like Claude by Anthropic and OpenAI Codex, enabling teams to assign tasks that execute autonomously.

**Background Execution:**
"Ship faster with AI that work alongside you" - Agents handle planning, exploration, and execution tasks in the background while developers continue other work.

**Enterprise Agent Management:**
"Manage agent usage with enterprise-grade controls" - Organizations track activity through detailed audit logs and enforce governance from a single control plane.

## Workspace & Knowledge Customization

**Copilot Spaces:**
Organizations create "a shared source of truth" by building expert project contexts from docs and repositories, scaling knowledge across teams.

## Key Positioning

**Not a Replacement:**
The product is "called 'Copilot' not 'Autopilot'" - designed to boost developer efficiency while requiring continued human oversight and judgment.
competitors.content_hash:
# GitHub Copilot: Key Marketing & Feature Content

## Core Agent & Autonomous Capabilities

**Multi-Agent Support:**
"Use your agents, your way" - GitHub Copilot supports custom agents alongside third

changes.description: 主页核心标语从『Your AI accelerator for every workflow, from the editor to the enterprise』切换为『Use your agents, your way』/『Ship faster with AI that work alongside you』，叙事重心从『工具』转向『多 agent 自定义与并行协作』
changes.evidence: 「Use your agents, your way」「Ship faster with AI that work alongside you」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：『AI work alongside you』的并行工作表述方向上向『人机同协议协作』靠拢，但仍是『AI 辅助人』框架，未达『同构 session』高度

changes.description: 新增明确定位声明：『叫 Copilot 不叫 Autopilot』，强调持续的人类监督与判断
changes.evidence: 「called 'Copilot' not 'Autopilot' - designed to boost developer efficiency while requiring continued human oversight and judgment」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：GitHub 首次在主页文案层面正面定义『人类角色』，方向上与 meee2『人=慢 session 在 agent 图内』一致，但表述更保守（监督者而非协作节点），可作为 meee2 差异化论述的参照对象

key_findings: GitHub Copilot 核心营销语从『面向每个工作流的 AI 加速器』切换为『用你自己的方式驾驭 agents』，叙事重心从『工具』转向『多 agent 自定义与并行协作』
新增明确定位声明『叫 Copilot 不叫 Autopilot』——是 GitHub 首次在主页文案层面正面回应『AI 自主程度』议题，强调持续人类监督

competitors.name: Google Gemini / AI Studio
competitors.raw_snapshot:
Google Gemini / AI Studio 更新摘要（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，blog.google 与 gemini.google 均 403）：
Antigravity 2.0：『Antigravity 2.0 is a new desktop application designed as a central environment for working with multiple agents.』并配套全新 Antigravity CLI，可『spin up specialized subagents to tackle complex workflows, all protected by built-in cross-platform terminal sandboxing, credential masking, and hardened Git policies』。
Project Export：『you can bring entire projects from Google AI Studio to local development in Antigravity and production with a single click, including all of the context from your project so you can pick up where you left off.』
Workspace 集成：『Your agents can now natively call relevant Google Workspace APIs and embed them directly into your applications.』
分享机制：『Users on the web can share snapshots of their chats, canvases, and generated media in the Gemini app via Google Drive.』
competitors.content_hash:
Google Gemini / AI Studio 更新摘要（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，blog.google 与 gemini.google 均 403）：
Antigravity 2.0：『Antigravity 2.0 is a new desktop application designed as a central environment for working wit

changes.description: Google I/O 2026 发布 Antigravity 2.0：『专为多 agent 协作设计的中枢桌面应用』
changes.evidence: 「Antigravity 2.0 is a new desktop application designed as a central environment for working with multiple agents.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1 / #5：『管理多个 agent 的中枢桌面环境』直接对应 meee2 的核心定位方向，是本轮发现中结构重叠度最高的信号之一

changes.description: 新增『带完整上下文跨工具迁移项目、原位接续工作』能力（AI Studio → Antigravity → 生产环境）
changes.evidence: 「you can bring entire projects from Google AI Studio to local development in Antigravity and production with a single click, including all of the context from your project so you can pick up where you left off」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：『带着完整上下文跨工具迁移、原位接续』是跨 session / 跨工具 artifact pull 的具体竞品实现路径

changes.description: Gemini 当前的协作分享机制基于『快照』而非『活链接』
changes.evidence: 「Users on the web can share snapshots of their chats, canvases, and generated media in the Gemini app via Google Drive.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 反向参照锚点 #2：Google 当前选择『快照分享』而非『活链接』，与 meee2 范式形成对比，可作为差异化论据保留观察

key_findings: Google I/O 2026 发布 Antigravity 2.0：『专为多 agent 协作设计的中枢桌面应用』，与 meee2 的核心定位（统一管理人机协作 session）出现结构性重叠
新增『带完整上下文跨工具迁移项目、原位接续』能力，是 meee2 锚点 #4（跨工具 artifact pull）的具体竞品实现路径
Gemini 当前协作分享机制基于『快照』而非『活链接』，与 meee2 范式形成对比，可作为差异化论据

competitors.name: Linear
competitors.raw_snapshot:
Linear 更新摘要（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，linear.app changelog 均 403）：
Linear Agent 公测（2026-03-24）：『Linear Agent is now available in public beta for all teams, with Agent and Skills included on all Linear plans.』
MCP 支持（2026-04-23）：『Linear Agent can now connect to your tools via MCP, bringing external context into your workflows to investigate issues, plan projects, write specs, and draft updates grounded in your full context.』
Code Intelligence（2026-05-14）：『Code Intelligence gives Linear Agent controlled access to your codebase, allowing it to reason about how your product actually works, not just what's captured in issues, projects, and docs.』
Skills：『When a conversation gets you to a good result, you can save it as a reusable skill』；Linear Diffs（2026-05-27）支持在 Linear 内审阅代码并与 GitHub 双向同步。
competitors.content_hash:
Linear 更新摘要（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，linear.app changelog 均 403）：
Linear Agent 公测（2026-03-24）：『Linear Agent is now available in public beta for all teams, with Agent and Skills included on all Linear pla

changes.description: Linear Agent 公测上线（所有套餐标配）并通过 MCP 把外部工具上下文拉入工作流
changes.evidence: 「Linear Agent can now connect to your tools via MCP, bringing external context into your workflows to investigate issues, plan projects, write specs, and draft updates grounded in your full context.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：『通过 MCP 把外部工具上下文拉入工作流』是跨工具 artifact pull 的直接实现

changes.description: Code Intelligence 让 agent 从真实代码行为推理产品逻辑，而非仅依赖文档记录
changes.evidence: 「Code Intelligence gives Linear Agent controlled access to your codebase, allowing it to reason about how your product actually works, not just what's captured in issues, projects, and docs.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #3：『从代码库真实行为推理产品逻辑，而非仅依赖文档记录』与 meee2『descriptive-first，flow 从真实行为 emerge』高度同构

key_findings: Linear Agent 于 2026年3月公测上线并成为所有套餐标配，4-5月快速叠加 MCP 支持、Code Intelligence、Diffs 代码评审，正从『项目管理工具』向『团队 agent 操作系统』演化
Code Intelligence『从真实代码行为推理而非依赖文档』的思路与 meee2 descriptive-first 锚点高度同构，是本轮发现中结构重叠度最高的单点信号之一

competitors.name: Slack
competitors.raw_snapshot:
Slack 更新摘要（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，itunes lookup 与官网均 403）：
Slackbot 升级：『An upgraded Slackbot adds contextual intelligence, graduating it from a notification helper to a deeply personal AI agent for work. Built natively into Slack with absolutely no setup required, Slackbot is the agent who's always up to speed because it lives right where your work happens.』
Agentforce：『Agentforce can take actions in Slack like creating and updating channels, lists, and canvases. You can now add Agentforce agents to channels so they can participate in conversations just like your teammates.』
开发者平台：新增 `slack create agent` 命令、Bolt 框架增强、bring-your-own-LLM，并提供 Starter Agent / Support Agent 两个开源示例（支持 Claude SDK / OpenAI SDK / Pydantic AI）。
competitors.content_hash:
Slack 更新摘要（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，itunes lookup 与官网均 403）：
Slackbot 升级：『An upgraded Slackbot adds contextual intelligence, graduating it from a notification helper to a deeply personal AI agent for wor

changes.description: Agentforce agent 现可作为『队友』身份加入频道并参与对话
changes.evidence: 「You can now add Agentforce agents to channels so they can participate in conversations just like your teammates.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：『agent 像队友一样加入对话participate』是『人机同协议、同图协作』范式在通讯类产品中的具体落地，是本轮 md 类竞品中信号最强的发现

key_findings: Slack 升级 Slackbot 为『始终在场的个人 AI agent』，并允许 Agentforce agent 以『队友』身份加入频道参与对话——是『人机同构协作』范式在通讯类产品中的具体落地

competitors.name: Reflect
competitors.raw_snapshot:
Reflect 更新摘要（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，HN Algolia 均 403）：
AI 模型可在 GPT-4o 与 Claude 3.5 Sonnet 间切换；图片可离线保存并在恢复网络后自动同步；移动端新增 AI palette editor 与自定义 prompt 克隆保存；保存链接时自动生成 AI 摘要；新增 iCal 日历事件接入；新增『选中文本自动生成回链』功能。
competitors.content_hash:
Reflect 更新摘要（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，HN Algolia 均 403）：
AI 模型可在 GPT-4o 与 Claude 3.5 Sonnet 间切换；图片可离线保存并在恢复网络后自动同步；移动端新增 AI palette editor 与自定义 prompt 克隆保存；保存链接时自动生成 AI 摘要；新增 iCal 日历事件接入；新增『选中文本自动生成回链』功能
competitors.no_change_reason: 首次抓取成功（此前持续 403），但本轮内容均为常规功能迭代（AI 模型切换、离线图片同步、自动回链、iCal 接入等），未发现触及 meee2 差异化锚点的信号

competitors.name: Raycast
competitors.raw_snapshot:
Raycast 更新摘要（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，changelog feed 均 403）：
『Presets are now called Agents and are reused across chats, allowing you to update an agent's configuration once and have the change apply to every chat that uses it.』
团队协作：『Teams can now share AI Agents, AI Commands, and Dictation Styles across the organization』
MCP：『You can now install MCP servers and use them in Quick AI and AI Chat.』
Skills：『Skills allow you to give Raycast AI custom instructions and knowledge for tasks you do often, and they are loaded into the chat dynamically when relevant.』
新增 Raycast for iOS（AI chat、笔记、quicklinks、跨设备同步）。
competitors.content_hash:
Raycast 更新摘要（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，changelog feed 均 403）：
『Presets are now called Agents and are reused across chats, allowing you to update an agent's configuration once and have the change apply to

changes.description: Presets 更名为 Agents 并支持团队级跨组织共享，叠加 MCP 服务器接入能力
changes.evidence: 「Teams can now share AI Agents, AI Commands, and Dictation Styles across the organization」「You can now install MCP servers and use them in Quick AI and AI Chat.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4 / #5：作为同属『外围层』(menu bar) 定位的竞品，Raycast 正构建『团队共享 agent 配置 + 跨工具 MCP 接入』能力，与 meee2 的外围层 + 跨工具 artifact pull 方向出现交集

key_findings: Raycast 将『Presets』更名为『Agents』并支持团队级共享，叠加 MCP 服务器接入能力——作为同属『外围层』定位的竞品，其『团队共享配置 + 跨工具上下文』演化路径值得持续关注

competitors.name: Replit
competitors.raw_snapshot:
Replit 更新摘要（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，blog feed 均 403）：
Agent 4：『Agent 4 provides a collaborative, multi-agent canvas for shipping apps/sites/slides, featuring a more collaborative, canvas-like workflow with parallel agents for apps, sites, and slides.』
可在同一项目内构建 app / 网站 / 幻灯片等多种产出，共享上下文与设计；可创建 Linear ticket、回答 Notion 问题、分析 Excel 数据。
团队协作：『Multi-user vibe coding via the kanban is a significant milestone for enterprises... managing tasks through diverse role definitions.』
competitors.content_hash:
Replit 更新摘要（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，blog feed 均 403）：
Agent 4：『Agent 4 provides a collaborative, multi-agent canvas for shipping apps/sites/slides, featuring a more collaborative, canvas-like workflow w

changes.description: Agent 4 推出『multi-agent canvas』协作范式，将多 agent 并行执行与画布式协作直接绑定
changes.evidence: 「Agent 4 provides a collaborative, multi-agent canvas for shipping apps/sites/slides, featuring a more collaborative, canvas-like workflow with parallel agents for apps, sites, and slides.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1 / #3：『multi-agent canvas』把『多 agent 并行』与『画布』直接结合，是本轮 md 竞品中与 meee2（descriptive canvas + 多 session 协议）结构重叠度最高的发现

changes.description: 新增多用户协同编程（kanban + 角色分工）
changes.evidence: 「Multi-user vibe coding via the kanban is a significant milestone for enterprises... managing tasks through diverse role definitions」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：多用户 + 多角色协同雏形，重叠度弱于 multi-agent canvas

key_findings: Replit Agent 4 推出『multi-agent canvas』协作范式，将多 agent 并行执行与画布式协作直接绑定——是本轮 md 类竞品中与 meee2 核心抽象（descriptive canvas + 多 session 协同）结构重叠度最高的单点信号

competitors.name: Superwhisper
competitors.raw_snapshot:

2月：新增 Gemini、Grok 模型及更多 OpenAI / Anthropic 模型；Parakeet 多语言转写功能转正式版；新增 Vocabulary & Replacements 设计与激活 UI 改进。
competitors.content_hash:
Superwhisper 更新摘要（来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文，HN Algolia 均 403）：
v2.13.0（4月24日）：『introduced a new design for Modes with dedicated settings view and improved activation flow, along with integrated Claude Cod

changes.description: v2.13.0 新增对 Claude Code / Open Code agent 的直接集成
changes.evidence: 「introduced a new design for Modes with dedicated settings view and improved activation flow, along with integrated Claude Code and Open Code agents for enhanced AI assistance」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：Superwhisper 作为外围语音工具开始直接桥接编码 agent session，与 meee2『外围层（菜单栏）戳入任意 session』的结构方向出现交集，建议关注其是否进一步发展为『外围层统一入口』

key_findings: Superwhisper v2.13.0 新增对 Claude Code / Open Code agent 的直接集成——作为外围语音工具开始桥接编码 agent session，是 lo 威胁竞品中罕见的结构性信号，建议持续关注

alerts.headline: Windsurf 更名为『Devin Desktop』，明确定位为『管理你所有 agent 的指挥中心』
alerts.evidence: 「Devin Desktop is the new name for Windsurf. We're building on the IDE foundation of Windsurf to introduce the command center for managing all your agents in one place.」
alerts.action_suggestion: 立即跟踪 Devin Desktop 的产品形态、UI 设计与定价策略；评估其『统一管理所有 agent 的指挥中心』定位是否会延伸到『人也是 session 节点』层面——这是当前对 meee2 核心定位威胁最直接的单一信号

alerts.headline: Anthropic 在 Claude Code 中引入『agent 团队协作』能力（Routines + 多 agent 编队）
alerts.evidence: 「In Claude Code, you can now assemble agent teams to work on tasks together.」
alerts.action_suggestion: 持续监控 Claude Code『agent 团队』功能的协议设计——若 Anthropic 把『人』纳入 agent 团队的同一协作图，将直接命中 meee2 锚点 #1；建议提前布局 descriptive canvas / 跨工具 live link 差异化论述

alerts.headline: Cursor 3.0 把 IDE 重新定位为『Agent Execution Runtime』，canvas 新增可点击交互按钮 + 云端 agent 异步汇报
alerts.evidence: 「The new Cursor interface allows you to run many agents in parallel across repos and environments... is centered around agents.」「the ability for agents to embed buttons in canvases that will run a specific prompt when clicked」
alerts.action_suggestion: 关注 Cursor canvas『agent 嵌入可点击 prompt 按钮』是否进一步发展为『活链接』范式，以及云端 agent 异步汇报机制是否扩展为通用『人机异步协议』

alerts.headline: OpenAI『workspace agents』将于 7月6日转入商业化，明确定位为可跨团队共享、『build once use together』
alerts.evidence: 「Workspace agents help teams get more done together across tools, can own entire workflows on their own, follow team processes, and be shared across teams so people can build once and use together.」
alerts.action_suggestion: 关注 7月6日商业化后『workspace agents』跨团队共享机制的具体实现细节，评估是否会形成与 meee2 锚点 #4（跨 session/跨工具/跨 owner artifact pull）直接竞争的框架

alerts.headline: GitHub Copilot 新增定位声明『叫 Copilot 不叫 Autopilot』，标语转向『用你自己的方式驾驭 agents』
alerts.evidence: 「called 'Copilot' not 'Autopilot' - designed to boost developer efficiency while requiring continued human oversight and judgment」
alerts.action_suggestion: 『Copilot 不是 Autopilot』的定位声明值得作为差异化论述的参照——可借此强化 meee2『人即 session 节点（而非旁观监督者）』的叙事区隔

alerts.headline: Google I/O 2026 发布 Antigravity 2.0：『专为多 agent 协作设计的中枢桌面应用』+ 跨工具带上下文项目迁移
alerts.evidence: 「Antigravity 2.0 is a new desktop application designed as a central environment for working with multiple agents.」
alerts.action_suggestion: Antigravity 2.0『多 agent 中枢桌面』与 meee2 核心定位高度相似，建议详细评估其 UI/UX 是否触及『人机同协议』层；同时其『snapshot 分享』与 meee2『live link』的范式差异可作为差异化论据

alerts.headline: Linear Agent 公测后快速叠加 MCP 跨工具上下文与 Code Intelligence（从真实代码行为推理产品逻辑）
alerts.evidence: 「Code Intelligence gives Linear Agent controlled access to your codebase, allowing it to reason about how your product actually works, not just what's captured in issues, projects, and docs.」
alerts.action_suggestion: 重点关注 Linear Code Intelligence『从真实代码行为推理产品逻辑』的具体实现路径——这与 meee2 descriptive-first 锚点高度同构，建议研究是否需要加速差异化或借鉴其落地方式
